---
pagetitle: "RC42 Resources"
description: "Academic materials, publications, datasets, teaching resources, and tools shared by the RC42 community."
toc: false
page-layout: full
title-block-style: none
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
---

```{css, echo=FALSE}
/* FIX FOR QUARTO STICKY ISSUE */
.resources-page,
.resources-inner,
.resources-layout,
.resources-toc-col,
.resources-main,
#quarto-content,
.page-columns,
.page-layout-full,
.page-full,
main.content {
  overflow: visible !important;
  transform: none !important;
  contain: none !important;
}

/* Base Layout */
.resources-page {
  font-family: var(--bs-body-font-family, system-ui, -apple-system, sans-serif);
  color: #334155;
  width: 100%;
}

.resources-inner {
  width: min(100% - 48px, 1440px);
  margin-inline: auto;
}

/* Compact Header */
.resources-header {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  padding-bottom: 1.5rem;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  align-items: flex-start;
  max-width: 900px;
}
.header-eyebrow {
  font-size: 0.85rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #0d9488;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
}
.resources-header h1 {
  font-size: 2.25rem;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin: 0 0 0.5rem 0;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.resources-header .subtitle {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  color: #334155;
  font-weight: 600;
  margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
}
.resources-header p {
  font-size: 1rem;
  color: #475569;
  line-height: 1.5;
  max-width: 800px;
  margin: 0 0 1rem 0;
}
.btn-submit {
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
  background: #0d9488;
  color: white;
  padding: 0.5rem 1rem;
  border-radius: 6px;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  font-weight: 600;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: background 0.2s;
}
.btn-submit:hover {
  background: #0f766e;
  color: white;
}

/* Two-column Layout */
.resources-layout {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(760px, 1fr) 300px;
  gap: 56px;
  align-items: start;
  padding-bottom: 4rem;
}

.resources-main {
  min-width: 0;
  width: 100%;
}

.resources-toc-col {
  width: 300px;
  min-width: 300px;
}

/* Sidebar TOC */
.resources-toc {
  position: sticky;
  top: 96px;
  max-height: calc(100vh - 120px);
  overflow-y: auto;
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #dbe3ef;
  border-radius: 18px;
  padding: 24px;
  box-shadow: 0 12px 28px rgba(15, 23, 42, 0.08);
}
.resources-toc h3 {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  color: #64748b;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 1rem;
  font-weight: 700;
}

.toc-nav {
  list-style: none;
  padding: 0;
  margin: 0;
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.25rem;
}

.toc-section-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}

.toc-link {
  display: flex;
  justify-content: space-between;
  align-items: center;
  padding: 0.5rem 0.75rem;
  color: #475569;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  border-radius: 6px;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  transition: all 0.2s;
  border-left: 3px solid transparent;
}

.toc-link:hover {
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #0d9488;
}

.toc-count {
  font-size: 0.75rem;
  background: #e2e8f0;
  color: #475569;
  padding: 0.1rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.toc-section-item.is-active .toc-link {
  background: #eef6f6;
  color: #00897b;
  border-left: 3px solid #0aa79d;
  font-weight: 600;
}

.toc-section-item.is-active .toc-count {
  background: #ccfbf1;
  color: #00796b;
}

.toc-preview {
  list-style: none;
  margin: 8px 0 0 0;
  padding-left: 14px;
  font-size: 0.78rem;
  line-height: 1.35;
  color: #64748b;
  border-left: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
  margin-left: 0.75rem;
}

.toc-preview li {
  margin-bottom: 0.4rem;
}

.toc-preview a {
  color: inherit;
  text-decoration: none !important;
}

.toc-preview a:hover {
  color: #0d9488;
}

@media (max-width: 1100px) {
  .resources-layout {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 2rem;
  }
  .resources-toc-col {
    width: 100%;
    min-width: 0;
    order: -1;
  }
  .resources-toc {
    position: static;
    max-height: none;
    overflow-y: visible;
    box-shadow: none;
    padding: 1.5rem;
    margin-bottom: 1rem;
  }
  .toc-preview {
    display: none !important;
  }
}

/* Metrics Row */
.resources-metrics {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 2rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.5rem;
}
.metric-item {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.metric-value {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #1e293b;
}
.metric-label {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
  font-weight: 600;
}

/* Search */
.resources-search-container {
  margin-bottom: 2rem;
  position: relative;
}
.search-bar {
  width: 100%;
  padding: 0.85rem 1.25rem;
  border: 1px solid #cbd5e1;
  border-radius: 8px;
  font-size: 1rem;
  background: #f8fafc;
  color: #334155;
  transition: all 0.2s;
}
.search-bar:focus {
  outline: none;
  border-color: #0d9488;
  background: #ffffff;
  box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(13, 148, 136, 0.1);
}

/* Directory Sections */
.resources-section {
  margin-bottom: 2.5rem;
  scroll-margin-top: 110px;
}
.resources-section h2 {
  font-size: 1.5rem;
  color: #1e293b;
  margin-top: 0;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  padding-bottom: 0.5rem;
  border-bottom: 2px solid #e2e8f0;
}
.resources-section > p {
  color: #64748b;
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  margin-bottom: 1.25rem;
}

/* Directory Listing (Compact Row) */
.resource-directory {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
}
.resource-item {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) auto;
  gap: 24px;
  padding: 28px 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  scroll-margin-top: 110px;
}
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .resource-item {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    gap: 1rem;
  }
}
.resource-item:last-child {
  border-bottom: none;
}

.resource-main-content {
  display: flex;
  flex-direction: column;
  gap: 0.35rem;
}

.resource-title {
  font-size: 1.15rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #183a8a;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  line-height: 1.3;
}
.resource-title:hover {
  text-decoration: underline !important;
  color: #1e40af;
}

.resource-author-type {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  color: #475569;
  font-weight: 500;
}
.resource-author-type .type-dot {
  margin: 0 0.4rem;
  color: #cbd5e1;
}

.resource-description {
  font-size: 0.95rem;
  color: #334155;
  line-height: 1.5;
  margin: 0.25rem 0;
}

.resource-meta {
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.6rem;
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  align-items: center;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
}

.resource-badge {
  font-size: 0.7rem;
  padding: 0.15rem 0.4rem;
  border-radius: 4px;
  background: #f1f5f9;
  color: #475569;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  font-weight: 600;
  text-transform: uppercase;
  letter-spacing: 0.05em;
}
.badge-verified {
  background: #ecfdf5;
  color: #059669;
  border-color: #a7f3d0;
}

.resource-tags {
  font-size: 0.8rem;
  color: #64748b;
  margin-top: 0.25rem;
  display: flex;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  gap: 0.4rem;
}
.resource-chip {
  background: #f8fafc;
  border: 1px solid #e2e8f0;
  padding: 0.1rem 0.5rem;
  border-radius: 12px;
  color: #64748b;
}

.resource-action {
  white-space: nowrap;
  font-weight: 700;
}
.resource-link-btn {
  font-size: 0.9rem;
  font-weight: 700;
  color: #00897b;
  text-decoration: none !important;
  display: inline-flex;
  align-items: center;
}
.resource-link-btn:hover {
  color: #00695c;
  text-decoration: underline !important;
}
```

<section class="resources-page">
<div class="resources-inner">

<header class="resources-header">
<div class="header-eyebrow">RC42 Resources</div>
<h1>Resources</h1>
<p>Academic materials, publications, datasets, teaching resources, and tools shared by the RC42 community.</p>
</header>

<div class="resources-layout">
<main class="resources-main">
  <!-- Overview Metrics -->
  <div id="overview-metrics-container"></div>

  <!-- Search & Category Filters -->
  <div class="resources-search-container" style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 1rem;">
    <label for="resources-search" class="visually-hidden">Search resources</label>
    <input type="text" id="resources-search" class="search-bar" placeholder="Search by title, author, description, or tags..." />
    <div id="category-filter-container" style="display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 0.5rem;"></div>
  </div>

  <!-- Core Resources -->
  <div id="core-resources-container"></div>

  <!-- Community Resources Section -->
  <section class="resources-section" id="community-resources-section" data-resource-section="community-resources-section" style="margin-top: 4rem; padding-top: 2.5rem; border-top: 2px solid #e2e8f0;">
    <h2>Community Resources</h2>
    <p>Resources shared through the RC42 community contribution system.</p>
    <div id="community-resources-container" class="resource-directory"></div>
  </section>
</main>

<aside class="resources-toc-col">
  <nav class="resources-toc" aria-label="Resources navigation">
    <h3>On this page</h3>
    <ul class="toc-nav" id="resources-toc-list"></ul>
  </nav>
</aside>
</div>

</div>
</section>

```{=html}
<script src="../assets/js/resources.js"></script>
```
